caption:
The rain tasted like copper and neon. 🌧️💻

I adjusted the collar of my synthetic leather coat, feeling the damp chill seep against the warmth of my skin. This wasn't just a night out; it was a data drop. 

My boots clicked against the chrome grates as I slipped into the back entrance of *The Circuit*. The bass thrummed through the soles of my feet, vibrating my bones. The air smelled of ozone, expensive perfume, and the metallic tang of a million secrets waiting to be sold. 💃✨

I checked the reflection in a dark window. My outfit was a masterpiece of stealth and seduction. A fitted corset-like bodysuit hugged every curve I owned, black mesh fabric that shimmered under the strobe lights. Below, the leather shorts were tight enough to accentuate my hips, but the skirt that hung below flared just enough to hide the shape of my legs, leaving nothing to the imagination yet revealing everything. My chest rose and fell rhythmically, the fabric straining against the swell of my curves, hidden but unmistakable. 🖤🔥

I spotted him in the corner. A fixer. The kind who buys more than just files. He looked up, eyes scanning me as I moved through the crowd. The way my hips swayed, the subtle bounce of my chest under the fabric—it all screamed *danger*. 🔪🌃

"You're late," he said, a smirk playing on his lips.

"Traffic was heavy," I purred, letting my fingers trail lightly down my thigh. "But I made sure the ride was worth the wait."

The crowd parted. The lights flickered, casting a kaleidoscope of pink and blue shadows over the sleek contours of my body. I felt the heat of a dozen stares, but my focus was sharp. One file. One deal. And tonight, I was the star of the show. 💋📱

I walked to him, the hem of my coat brushing the floor. The air hummed with electricity.

"Here's the data," I whispered, extending a gloved hand. "Now, tell me what you're buying."

He smiled, but it didn't reach his eyes. "More than just data. Something... personal."

I tilted my head, the neon lights dancing in my dark hair. "Then let's make it interesting."

The bass thumped louder. My heart raced with anticipation.

#Cyberpunk #DarkMode
